title: Typing notifications broadcast to all relay subscribers, not per-chat
description: TypingNotifyParams has no chat_id field. The relay broadcasts typing notifications to all connected clients globally, using default_channel_id on the daemon side. This works for a single-room architecture but leaks typing activity if a relay ever serves multiple disjoint user groups. More critically, TypingParams sent by clients contains no room qualifier, so the wire protocol has no slot for per-chat typing isolation. The fix requires adding chat_id to TypingParams and TypingNotifyParams at the protocol level (core/src/protocol.rs) — a wire-breaking change that locks in now.
close_reason: Single-room architecture (design decision): all users share one room, so broadcast-to-all is correct. Adding chat_id would pre-engineer multi-room support the project explicitly does not have.
